_meta.title: ui-calendar mode="range" — date-range mode on the existing calendar (Kim fork rulings 2026-07-07)
_meta.diff-from-v1: Kim resolved ADR-0093 fork F1 as MODE FLAG (overruling the drafted standalone ui-calendar-range) and F2 as SWAP (overruling the drafted MD3 restart). Structural consequences: the _base/calendar-element.ts extraction nodes (base/base-shell/base-grid/base-datemath/base-seams) and the thin-leaf `single` node are DELETED — with one component there is no second consumer, the #-private machinery stays private in calendar.ts (ADR-0048's roving-grid trigger still does not fire); a-expose-seams is deleted with them; a-restart becomes a-swap; NEW mode-surface node hosts the mode prop + one-live-value-surface arbitration; integration loses the new-export work (no barrel/BASE_CLASSES change — the existing calendar marginal re-bases instead). v1 (calendar-range.decomp.json) stands as the record of the standalone-component plan.
_meta.note: OUT of scope (follow-up, own concern, ADR-0087 scope policy): the A2UI `Calendar` catalog-row EDIT — an optional `mode` property + one-way valueStart/valueEnd binds (the row's one two-way slot stays `value`, inert in range mode, until the catalog schema grows a second slot). No new catalog row.
_meta.adr: 0093-calendar-range-selection.md (proposed; rewritten in place pre-ratification per the fork rulings)

nodes.label: ui-calendar (controls/calendar/) — the one calendar control, now mode-flagged

mode prop (enum single|range, default single, reflect) + valueStart/valueEnd props (attrs value-start/value-end, reflect, ''=unset) + the one-live-value-surface rule: off-mode value props are inert (held+reflected, contribute nothing) and NEVER written by the control on a mode switch
nodes.accept: contract<->props trip-wire green; attr<->prop round-trip for mode/value-start/value-end; markup with NO mode attr renders byte-identical (existing suites unmodified); inertness probes: value set in range mode contributes nothing to formValue/render, valueStart/valueEnd set in single mode contribute nothing; flipping mode writes zero value props

nodes.label: pick state machine in calendar.ts (#commitDate goes mode-aware): idle -> selecting-end -> complete; second pick commits [min,max] of {pick, pendingStart} — earlier pick SWAP-completes (Kim F2); same-day = single-day range; pick on complete range starts a new one (valueStart=pick, valueEnd=''); emits select per pick, change only on completion
nodes.accept: jsdom tests cover all 4 transitions (forward-complete, swap-complete, same-day, new-over-complete) with click AND Enter/Space parity; disabled/out-of-range pick is a no-op; change fires exactly once per completion

nodes.label: normalized in-progress band preview: while selecting-end, cells between the pending start and the hover/keyboard-cursor candidate are marked data-in-range as [min,max] — a candidate EARLIER than the pending start previews the swapped band, so commit never differs from preview
nodes.accept: jsdom: with pending start, a candidate LATER marks [start,candidate] and a candidate EARLIER marks [candidate,start]; leaving/blur clears; single mode never stamps data-range-* (grep + runtime probe)

nodes.label: pure in-range predicate in calendar.ts date-math: lexicographic zero-padded ISO string compare (start <= iso && iso <= end), zero Date construction; applies to any displayed cell incl. [data-outside] and months containing neither endpoint
nodes.accept: unit tests for the predicate as pure string comparison; grep-provable: no `new Date(` on the compare path; a band spanning a month boundary renders on both grids

nodes.label: mode-conditional form seams: range formValue() = FormData 2 entries under one `name` (start first) when complete, null when half-open/inverted; formValidity adds half-open + inverted (programmatic-only — sets are never auto-swapped) + per-endpoint min/max; formReset/formStateRestore of the pair; single-mode seams untouched
nodes.accept: jsdom: range submission yields exactly 2 same-name entries when complete, 0 when half-open; programmatic inverted pair STAYS inverted and reports invalid (no auto-swap); validity flags per enumerated case; reset restores authored attrs; single-mode form suite passes unmodified

nodes.label: visually-hidden aria-live=polite status region (range mode only): announces 'Start date set — choose an end date' and, on completion, both dates in order (a swapped completion is audible as the resulting range)
nodes.accept: jsdom: status text updates on each state transition; completion announcement names start then end; region is in the a11y tree (not display:none); absent/silent in single mode

nodes.label: calendar.css range rules: endpoints (data-range-start/-end) reuse the selected-fill circles; interior [data-in-range] square (radius-0) wash; aria-selected across the whole run; WHCM: band = Highlight/HighlightText, today keeps ButtonText inset, focus keeps outside Highlight (4 distinct states)
nodes.accept: browser test (Chromium+WebKit): endpoint vs interior computed backgrounds differ; forced-colors probe keeps focus/band/today/disabled distinct

nodes.label: realize the calendar.css line-71 reservation: --ui-calendar-range-fill/-ink alias --md-sys-color-primary-surface / -primary-on-surface (AA pair; tokens seat verifies)
nodes.accept: tokens resolve in both schemes; contrast probe: range-ink on range-fill >= 4.5:1 in light AND dark

nodes.label: EXISTING #-private grid/keyboard/nav/shell machinery in calendar.ts — stays #-private and unmoved (no _base extraction; one consumer, ADR-0048 roving-grid trigger unfired); range lands as guarded mode branches inside #commitDate/#rebuildGrid/#updateCellStates
nodes.accept: existing calendar jsdom + browser suites (2D nav, month-boundary regeneration, roving tabindex, commit semantics) pass UNMODIFIED; no member visibility widened to protected/public

nodes.label: calendar.md descriptor update: frontmatter gains mode/value-start/value-end rows with per-mode liveness noted; keyboard/aria/forcedColors sections gain the range legs; site calendar page gains a range demo
nodes.accept: validateComponentDescriptor green; descriptor trip-wire green; single-mode descriptor rows unchanged; site nav/coverage gates green

nodes.label: size integration: NO barrel/BASE_CLASSES/exports change (no new control); the existing calendar leave-one-out marginal re-bases (ADR-0080), family budget (ADR-0049) re-checked; manual `npm run size` (Kim's ADR-0040 §3 ruling)
nodes.accept: barrels drift gate green (unchanged); calendar marginal <= cap or a cited pinned-table re-base; `npm run size` run by hand and its verdict recorded in the slice handback

actions.label: author declaratively selects range behavior on the one calendar; exactly one value surface is live per mode, off-mode props inert
pick a start date (click / Enter / Space)
pick an end date, completing the range
a second pick EARLIER than the pending start completes the range with the dates reordered so start stays earlier (Kim F2: swap, not restart)
preview the in-progress band while choosing the end (hover + keyboard cursor), normalized in both directions so preview = commit
render the committed interior fill between the endpoints ('days inside selection filled')
2D grid keyboard navigation incl. month-boundary regeneration (existing model, must survive the in-place edit)
prev/next month navigation with focus-cursor clamp (existing, must survive)
decide 'is this day inside [start,end]' timezone-safely (lexicographic zero-padded ISO compare — no Date parsing)
contribute the pair to form submission (two entries under one name; nothing when incomplete); single-mode submission unchanged
report validity: required-empty, half-open, inverted (start>end via programmatic set only — never auto-swapped), min/max per endpoint
formReset to authored attrs; formStateRestore of a serialized pair
emit select per endpoint pick; change only on range completion (drives valueStart/valueEnd binds)
announce pick-state transitions to AT; completion names both dates in order so a swap is audible
default-mode ui-calendar behavior + the shipped A2UI Calendar catalog row remain byte/behavior-identical (the regression obligation of the in-place edit)
public surface machine-checkable (descriptor mirrors props, per-mode liveness stated)
the grown control's size marginal is measured, not guessed (ADR-0080; single-date consumers now carry the range code)

edges.why: the state machine writes the valueStart/valueEnd props and obeys the one-live-surface rule the mode surface declares
the preview rides the selecting-end state (pending start) the state machine maintains
the band marking calls the normalized in-range predicate for [min,max] of pending-start/candidate
the form seams branch on mode and read the pair props the mode surface declares
announcements fire on the state transitions the machine defines
the CSS targets the data attributes (data-range-start/-end/-in-range) the state/preview stamping emits
the styles alias --ui-calendar-range-fill/-ink; tokens must exist for the AA contrast probe to measure real values
the descriptor frontmatter mirrors the implemented props incl. per-mode liveness (trip-wire targets the built surface)
the size pass measures the complete change (ts+css); measuring before styling lands under-reports the marginal
site page + nav/coverage gates in the integration slice consume the descriptor
